optimisation_library.name: scikit-optimize (GP-BO)
optimisation_library.description: Gaussian Process Bayesian Optimisation with Expected Improvement. Suitable for low-dimensional continuous spaces with noisy observations. Already installed in MAESTRO.

optimisation_library.name: Random Search
optimisation_library.description: Uniform random sampling. No surrogate model. Useful as a baseline or when the search space is poorly understood.

optimisation_library.name: Honegumi (Ax Platform)
optimisation_library.description: Template generator for Bayesian optimisation built on Meta's Ax Platform. Supports multi-objective, multi-task, batch, categorical, and constrained optimisation. Best for complex materials science tasks.

optimisation_library.name: Optuna
optimisation_library.description: Hyperparameter optimisation with TPE sampler. Good for mixed (continuous + categorical) spaces and pruning of bad trials.

optimisation_library.name: DEAP (Evolutionary Algorithms)
optimisation_library.description: Distributed Evolutionary Algorithms in Python. Supports genetic algorithms and evolution strategies. Good for combinatorial and discrete spaces.
